headline: Promise vs Delivery: 2024 Pledges Revisited
context: Budget 2024 made 12 pledges. Five met targets. Four missed by 40%. Three quietly disappeared from the tracker.

cards.sub: Three of the five had success criteria quietly revised downward.
The tracker stopped reporting. Parliament got: 'under review.'

cards.big: Four targets missed by 40%+. Three were foreseeable.
cards.sub: Commodity price changes were predictable at the time of pledging.

cards.big: If the examiner can change the answers mid-test, what does 'pass' mean?
Accountability requires definitions that do not move.
